name: pyrdp
description: RDP man-in-the-middle and library for Python 3 with the ability to watch connections live or after the fact. Tool: https://github.com/gosecure/pyrdp. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #412 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map pyrdp output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved pyrdp output file to parse instead of running it live.
